sections.heading: Turn 1 (Descida do Sol): Tight Left-Hander
sections.body: • Tips: Brake just after the 100m board and turn in sharply. Downshift to 3rd gear. Hug the apex and prepare for quick transition into Turn 2.

sections.heading: Turn 2 (Senna S): Tight Right
sections.body: • Tips: Smooth throttle application is crucial. Avoid spinning the rear. Keep the car positioned left for a wide line into Turn 3.

sections.heading: Turn 3 (Curva do Sol): Flat-Out Curve
sections.body: • Tips: Flat in all dry conditions. DRS opens up shortly after exit. Perfect exit speed is vital for overtaking into Turn 4.

sections.heading: Turn 4 (Descida do Lago): Heavy Braking Zone
sections.body: • Tips: Great overtaking spot. Brake just before the 100m marker. Use 4th gear and mount a bit of the inside kerb without unsettling the car.

sections.heading: Turn 5: Left-Hand Kink
sections.body: • Tips: Stay flat and flow through to maintain speed heading into Turn 6. Line matters for the following tight corners.

sections.heading: Turn 6 (Ferradura): Long Right-Hander
sections.body: • Tips: Trail brake slightly and let the car roll. Keep tight to the inside but prepare for immediate change of direction.

sections.heading: Turn 7 (Laranjinha): Fast Left
sections.body: • Tips: Keep throttle steady. Position the car on the right to prepare for the tricky slow-speed section.

sections.heading: Turn 8 (Pinheirinho): Tight Right
sections.body: • Tips: Slowest part of the track. Brake early and avoid running wide on exit.

sections.heading: Turn 9 (Bico de Pato): Hairpin Left
sections.body: • Tips: Maximize rotation with a quick flick. Apply throttle gently on exit to avoid wheelspin.

sections.heading: Turn 10 (Mergulho): Downhill Right
sections.body: • Tips: Brake in a straight line, use 3rd gear, and get a clean exit for Turn 11.

sections.heading: Turn 11 (Juncao): Final Real Corner
sections.body: • Tips: Absolutely critical for lap time. Brake slightly earlier and sacrifice apex for strong exit onto the uphill straight.

sections.heading: Turns 12–15: Curva da Arquibancada + Reta Oposta
sections.body: • Tips: These are essentially flat-out sweeping bends. DRS opens on the main straight. Minimize steering input and run low downforce to maximize straight-line speed.

sections.heading: Setting up a car to master Brazil
sections.body:
Setup AreaRecommended SettingsAerodynamicsOptimise your aero to be high, with a higher front wing than rear.TransmissionRotation into slow corners is key, so lower your off throttle differential.SuspensionWith such a slow and undulating layout, you can soften your suspension.BrakesA low brake bias setup is key to avoiding lockups into the slower corners.TyresIncrease your tyre pressures to make the tyres last during a race.

Brazil
